hero.title: Savor Exquisite Flavors at NBC
hero.subtitle: Indulge in a curated collection of local culinary treasures, crafted with love and fresh ingredients by our master chefs.

about.title: A Culinary Journey Like No Other
about.story: At N.A., we believe food is an art form. Established in 2018, we have quickly become the community's favorite gathering spot, focusing on organic, farm-to-table ingredients and traditional cooking techniques that bring bold, delicious flavors to your plate.

services.name: Chef's Special Multi-Course Dinner
services.description: A signature 5-course degustation menu highlighting seasonal inputs and paired wines.

services.name: Private Table Reservation
services.description: Reserve our premium corner or window tables for celebrations, including welcome drinks.

services.name: Weekend Family Brunch
services.description: An all-you-can-eat spread with bottomless fresh mocktails, dessert bar, and live stations.

faqs.question: Do you offer vegan and gluten-free alternatives?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our menu has clear labels for vegan, vegetarian, and gluten-free items. You can also request custom modifications.

faqs.question: Can we book the entire restaurant for private events?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We host corporate dinners, birthday parties, and wedding receptions. Contact our manager for booking rates.

hero.title: Welcome to Govindam Residensy
hero.subtitle: Experience luxurious stays, premium hospitality, and breathtaking views right in the heart of the city.

about.title: Where Comfort Meets Elegance
about.story: Govindam Residensy was founded with a single mission: to redefine premium lodging and personalized guest experiences. Every room is designed to blend contemporary design with ultimate relaxation, ensuring your visit is nothing short of exceptional.

services.name: Deluxe Room Stay
services.description: Spacious king-size bedroom with ocean view, workspace, high-speed Wi-Fi, and smart TV.

services.name: Executive Suite
services.description: Ultimate luxury with separate lounge area, jacuzzi, complimentary minibar, and dining spaces.

services.name: Rooftop Fine Dining
services.description: Multi-cuisine restaurant offering local gourmet menus, premium wine tastings, and live music.

faqs.question: What are the check-in and check-out timings?
faqs.answer: Check-in is from 2:00 PM onwards, and check-out is by 11:00 AM. Early check-in or late check-out can be requested, subject to availability.

faqs.question: Is breakfast included in the booking rate?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our room bookings include a complimentary buffet breakfast at our lobby café.
